title: BayMesh 3 Bandpass Filter

test_results.notes: Factory label on this unit reads: Ideal 908.6-912.8 (4.1 MHz), Usable 907.4-914.0 (6.5 MHz), loss -1.21 dB at center 910.7 MHz.

description: Bandpass cavity filter with ~3.5MHz bandpass and two SMA connectors.
commentary: If you need a serious filter, this is the choice. Hand tuned/checked and sent with a spec sheet for your specific serial number. Can be retuned as needed but requires technical knowledge and a VNA. The Baymesh 3 is one of 3 filters (BM4 and BM5 are the others) made by Nullrouten of BayMesh.
